title: Marketplace Manager - Juicy Chemistry Asia Pacific Associates - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Juicy Chemistry Asia Pacific Associates - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Juicy Chemistry Asia Pacific Associates invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Kochi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Juicy Chemistry Asia Pacific Associates:
Juicy Chemistry Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Juicy Chemistry Asia Pacific Associates!
